zh.Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, British: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可
zh.Woodstock, Windham County, Connecticut: 美國康乃狄克州文達哈姆武德斯托可
zh.lifeSummary: 當Matturin Allard於大約1682年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可時，他的父親Matturin Allard33歲，母親UNKNOWN WIFE30歲。他於1724年7月18日與Joanna Ainsworth在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1774年3月29日在他的家鄉享年93歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Matturin Allard于大约1682年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可时，他的父亲Matturin Allard33岁，母亲UNKNOWN WIFE30岁。他于1724年7月18日与Joanna Ainsworth在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州文達哈姆武德斯托可结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1774年3月29日在他的家乡享年93岁。

nameMeanings.name: Allard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Gilles, Andre, Emile, Normand, Marcel, Alain, Armand, Gaston, Pierre, Antoine, Benoit, Fernand.

English: from a Middle English personal name, Alard, Adelard, Aylard, or Elard. The former two names are usually of native English origin, from Old English Æthelheard, composed of the elements æthel ‘noble’ + heard ‘hard, bold’. Alternatively, the surname may be of continental origin, from an ancient Germanic name (see 2 below), which developed in Old French to Alard, and in Middle Dutch to Adelaert and Alaert. The continental names were used in post-Conquest England by Normans and Flemings. Later development of -ard to -ett and -att in surnames means that these personal names may also lie behind some examples of e.g. Allatt and Hallett .
French: from the medieval personal name Alard, from ancient Germanic Adelhard, composed of the elements adal ‘noble’ + hard ‘hardy’. Compare Allar , Allor , Allord , and Allore .

variants.name: Ellerd
meanings: English (Bedfordshire and Northamptonshire): variant of   Allard  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.
Probably an altered form of German Ellert, a variant of Ehlert.

variants.name: Ellert
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Merwin, Traude.

variants.name: Hallett
meanings: English (mainly Somerset and Dorset): variant of Allatt, itself a variant of Allard , with prosthetic H-.

nameMeanings.name: Matturin
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Emile, Pierre, Serge, Alain, Andree, Armand, Carmelle, Donat, Etienne, Germain, Jean-Paul.

French and West Indian (mainly Haiti and Saint Lucia): from the French personal name Mathurin, from the Latin name Maturinus (a derivative of the adjective maturus ‘ripe’), borne by a 3rd-century Christian saint who was responsible for spreading the gospel in the district of Sens.

variants.name: Maturin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Sylvain.  Dutch Derk.

French: variant of Mathurin and, in North America, (also) an altered form of this. The surname Maturin, which is very rare in France, was also taken to Britain and Ireland by Huguenot refugees, but has now almost died out there.

en.lifeSummary: When Matturin Allard was born about 1682, in Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, his father, Matturin Allard, was 33 and his mother, UNKNOWN WIFE, was 30. He married Joanna Ainsworth on 18 July 1724, in Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 29 March 1774, in his hometown, at the age of 93.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Matturin Allard est né environ 1682, à Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Matturin Allard, avait 33 ans et sa mère, UNKNOWN WIFE, avait 30 ans. Il a épousé Joanna Ainsworth le 18 juillet 1724, à Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 29 mars 1774, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 93 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Matturin Allardが約1682年にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ウィンドハムウッドストックで生まれた時，父Matturin Allardは33歳，母UNKNOWN WIFEは30歳であった。1724年7月18日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ウィンドハムウッドストックでJoanna Ainsworthと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1774年3月29日に故郷で93歳で死去した。

ko.Woodstock, Windham, Connecticut, United: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡

ko.lifeSummary: Matturin Allard(이)가 대략 1682년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Matturin Allard(은)는 33세였고, 그의 어머니 UNKNOWN WIFE(은)는 30세였다. 그는 1724년 7월 18일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 윈드함 우드스톡에서 Joanna Ainsworth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1774년 3월 29일 그의 고향에서 93세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Matturin Allard nasceu aproximadamente 1682, em Woodstock, Windham, Conecticute, British Colonial America, seu pai, Matturin Allard, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, UNKNOWN WIFE, tinha 30 anos. Ele casou-se com Joanna Ainsworth em 18 de julho de 1724, em Woodstock, Windham, Conecticute, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 29 de março de 1774, em sua cidade natal, com 93 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Matturin Allard родился около 1682 г. в местности вудстокк, виндхам, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика, его отцу по имени Matturin Allard было 33 года, а матери, которую звали UNKNOWN WIFE, 30. Он женился на женщине по имени Joanna Ainsworth 18 июля 1724 г. в местности вудстокк, виндхам, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 29 марта 1774 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 93 лет.
